summary: PKO Poker Tournament testing completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - tournament creation, registration, add bots (+1, +3, Fill), table chat, leave & refund, and join existing tournament all working correctly. Chat messages appear in Table Chat panel. AI bots display correctly on poker table with chips and bounties.

issues: When bots are added, the player list at top shows 'Empty Seat' until page refresh or WebSocket update - minor UI sync delay

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/create - creates tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/register - registers player
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/add-bots?bot_count=3 - adds 3 bots correctly
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/add-bots?bot_count=9 - fills table with 9 bots
Backend: Cannot add bots to full table - returns 0 bots added
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/force-start - starts tournament
Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments/{id} - returns tournament state with chat_messages
Backend: GET /api/poker/my-tournament - returns current tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/leave - leaves with refund
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/force-leave - force leaves tournament
Frontend: Login and navigate to Casino
Frontend: PKO Poker card visible with NEW badge
Frontend: Create Table button creates tournament and navigates to table
Frontend: Success toast 'Tournament created! Waiting for players...'
Frontend: Add Bot buttons work (+1 Bot, +3 Bots, Fill with Bots)
Frontend: Success toasts 'Added 3 AI bot(s)!' and 'Added 6 AI bot(s)!'
Frontend: Poker table UI displays correctly (green felt, seats, action buttons)
Frontend: AI Bots visible on table with names (DeepStack, PokerMind, CardShark, etc.)
Frontend: Tournament info panel shows Blinds 25/50, Prize Pool, Level
Frontend: Table Chat panel present and functional
Frontend: Chat message 'Hello from test!' appears in Table Chat
Frontend: 'You're in a Tournament' screen shows when already registered
Frontend: 'Return to Table' button navigates to poker table
Frontend: 'Leave & Refund' button works with toast 'Left tournament. Buy-in refunded!'
Frontend: Join existing tournament works - navigates to poker table
critical_code_review_comments: All poker tournament features working correctly
Add bots API returns correct bots_added count
Chat messages persist in tournament state
WebSocket updates working for real-time sync
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tournaments created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PKO Poker Tournament fully functional. Key findings: 1) Create tournament, register, add bots all work, 2) Add bots correctly returns bots_added count (3 or 9 depending on available seats), 3) Table Chat working - messages appear in chat panel, 4) Leave & Refund works with proper refund, 5) Join existing tournament works, 6) AI bots display on table with names, chips, and bounties.
